commands.review_summary:
The PR changes Windows QMD spawn/package resolution, adds guarded handling for OpenAI-compatible image responses with data[].url, exports related SDK helpers, updates docs/tests, changes memory_search timeout behavior, and modifies the root dependency graph.

PR surface: Source +308, Tests +545, Docs 0, Config +1, Other +65. Total +919 across 29 files.

Reproducibility: yes. at source level: current main only parses b64_json image entries and QMD package fallback still targets the old qmd package name while @tobilu/qmd is the shipped package. I did not establish a live exact-head Windows QMD indexing/search reproduction in this read-only review, and the PR body says that full path was not tested.
